summary: Website Audit P0 Fixes - ALL 9 TESTS PASSED. Verified footer logo (white on dark bg), header logo theme-switching, testimonials section, Google Maps iframe, Quick View mobile visibility, luxury cinema hero, scroll-to-top navigation, and language switcher dark mode text.
critical_code_review_comments: Footer logo correctly uses /lexa-white.png directly (no invert filter needed)
Header logo uses computed logoSrc based on shouldUseDarkText and theme context - white on dark bg, black on light bg
Testimonials component dynamically loaded with fallback, shows CLIENT FEEDBACK heading with star ratings
Quick View buttons use sm:opacity-0 sm:group-hover:opacity-100 - visible on mobile without hover
Language switcher has proper dark:text-gray-300 class for dark mode visibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 website audit fixes verified: (1) Footer logo - /lexa-white.png visible on dark footer, (2) Header logo - switches between lexa-white.png (dark mode/homepage) and lexa-black.png (light mode when scrolled), (3) Testimonials section between TrustedInUAE and StatsSection with CLIENT FEEDBACK heading, (4) Google Maps iframe on /contact with data-testid='contact-map', (5) Quick View buttons on /projects and /blog visible on mobile 390px viewport, (6) Luxury Home Cinema hero at /luxury-home-cinema-dubai has opacity-80 image and uppercase title, (7) Scroll-to-top on route navigation via ClientLayout.tsx useEffect, (8) Language switcher text visible with dark:text-gray-300 class.

tests_executed.test: Footer logo: LEXA white logo visible on dark footer background
Header logo: White logo on homepage dark header (not scrolled)
Header logo: Theme-aware switching - black on light mode
Homepage: Testimonials section exists between TrustedInUAE and StatsSection
